title: Department Manager Vacancy at Cafe Coffee Day Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Cafe Coffee Day Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Cafe Coffee Day Digital Technologies in Lucknow is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Cafe Coffee Day Digital Technologies:
Cafe Coffee Day Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cafe Coffee Day Digital Technologies!
